description: Users need a notification center where they can see unread badges, open a notification list, mark notifications read or unread, filter by read state, and clear all read notifications. Store read state so it persists across sessions.

userStories.title: Add notification schema with read state
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to add schema for notifications that persists read state across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add schema for notifications with boolean read state

userStories.title: Add shared types for notifications
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to define types for notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Define notification type with read state

userStories.title: Add backend action to fetch notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want the backend to return my notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend endpoint returns list of notifications

userStories.title: Add UI for notification list and badge
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see an unread badge and open my notification list.
acceptanceCriteria: UI includes unread badge based on fetch data
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add backend action to toggle read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want the backend to support marking notifications read or unread.

userStories.title: Add UI to mark notifications read/unread
userStories.description: As a user, I want to toggle read state from the notification list.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list items have read/unread toggle control
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add UI to filter by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter my notification list to see only unread items.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list includes filter control for read state
List updates when filter is applied
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add backend action to clear read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want the backend to support clearing all read notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend endpoint deletes or archives read notifications

userStories.title: Add UI to clear read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want a button to clear all my read notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list includes a button to clear read items
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
